response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video, noting it's a promotional video with repetitive segments. 2. Identified the song as 'Hyper Jumpin'' by Hololive 5th Generation. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics (original Japanese and English translation). 4. Mapped the scenes by identifying the unique parts and accounting for repetitions, ensuring all segments are included in the JSON. 5. Formatted lyrics and added to the scene objects.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for the Hololive 5th Generation concert 'ねぽらぼライブ Re:VISION' (Neporabo Live Re:VISION), featuring a recurring performance of their original song 'Hyper Jumpin'' interspersed with informational graphics about concert participation, ticket information, and goods.

scenes.description: The video begins with a starry sky scene, with the Japanese text '奇跡が、はじまる。' (A miracle begins) appearing.
The song 'Hyper Jumpin'' begins, with the four Hololive 5th Generation members dancing on stage. Lyrics appear on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive 5th Generation (Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan)

scenes.description: Event title screen appears for 'ねぽらぼライブ Re:VISION'.
Informational slides detailing ticket purchasing, event dates, and merchandise for the concert.
Transition scene: The starry sky and text from the beginning are shown again.
